publications.ref: Flueck C, Drought LG, Jones A, Patel A, Perrin AJ, Walker EM, Nofal SD, Snijders AP, Blackman MJ, Baker DA. Phosphodiesterase beta is the master regulator of cAMP signalling during malaria parasite invasion. PLoS Biol. 2019 17(2):e3000154

Characteristics[Organism].note: Matches anchor information for Plasmodium falciparum

Characteristics[CellType].evidence: blood stage development of the malaria parasite

Characteristics[Label].evidence: Not explicitly stated in manuscript text
Characteristics[Label].note: Value from anchor information - TMT quantification mentioned

Characteristics[GeneticModification].evidence: conditional gene knockout approach, PDEβ disruption, PDEβ knockout

Characteristics[Treatment].evidence: Conditional gene disruption causes a profound reduction in invasion

Characteristics[DevelopmentalStage].evidence: essential for blood stage viability, blood stage development

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: Not explicitly stated in manuscript text

Characteristics[CleavageAgent].evidence: Samples were diluted with 50 mM HEPES to reduce the urea concentration to <2 M prior to trypsin digestion.

Characteristics[AlkylationReagent].evidence: A total of 1.05 mg of each protein sample was reduced by 5 mM dithiothreitol, alkylated with 10 mM iodoacetamide, and quenched with 7.5 mM dithiothreitol.

Characteristics[ReductionReagent].evidence: A total of 1.05 mg of each protein sample was reduced by 5 mM dithiothreitol, alkylated with 10 mM iodoacetamide, and quenched with 7.5 mM dithiothreitol.

Characteristics[Label].evidence: Samples were resuspended in 50 mM HEPES and 30% (v/v) acetonitrile, and the corresponding TMTsixplex (0.8 mg) label (resuspended in anhydrous acetonitrile) was added (TMT6-126, -127, -128 to +RAP; TMT6-129, -130, -131 to DMSO).

Characteristics[Modification].evidence: Default MaxQuant parameters were used with the following adjustments: reporter ion MS2 with the sixplex TMT isobaric labels was selected, Phospho(STY) was added as a variable modification

Comment[EnrichmentMethod].evidence: Dried peptide mixtures were resuspended in 1 M glycolic acid + 80% acetonitrile + 5% trifluoroacetic acid and added to titanium dioxide beads (5:1 [w/w] beads:protein), washed under acidic pH, and eluted from the beads by adding 1% ammonium hydroxide followed by 5% ammonium hydroxide

Comment[FractionationMethod].value: Pierce High pH Reversed-Phase Peptide Fractionation
Comment[FractionationMethod].evidence: the other two thirds was fractionated and desalted by the use of a Pierce High pH Reversed-Phase Peptide Fractionation Kit

Comment[Separation].evidence: Each run consisted of a 3-hour gradient elution (75 μm × 50 cm C18 column)

Comment[Instrument].evidence: An Orbitrap Fusion Lumos was used for data acquisition.

Comment[FragmentationMethod].evidence: with higher-energy collision dissociation (HCD) being the selected activation method

Comment[AcquisitionMethod].evidence: Not explicitly stated but inferred from standard shotgun proteomics workflow described

Comment[IonizationType].evidence: Not explicitly mentioned in manuscript text

Comment[MS2MassAnalyzer].evidence: Orbitrap Fusion Lumos instrument uses orbitrap for MS2 analysis

Comment[CollisionEnergy].evidence: No collision energy parameters specified in the methods section

Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance].evidence: No precursor mass tolerance specified in the methods section

Comment[FragmentMassTolerance].evidence: No fragment mass tolerance specified in the methods section

Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages].evidence: No missed cleavages parameter specified in the methods section

Comment[GradientTime].evidence: Each run consisted of a 3-hour gradient elution (75 μm × 50 cm C18 column)

Comment[FlowRateChromatogram].evidence: No flow rate specified in the methods section

Comment[FractionIdentifier].evidence: No fractionation information found in manuscript text or filenames

Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].evidence: No biological replicate information explicitly stated in manuscript text
Characteristics[BiologicalReplicate].note: Filename analysis shows '_A1' suffix pattern in multiple files (92-149138155_A1.raw, 92-149139486_A1.raw, 92-149138154_A1.raw, 92-149137486_A1.raw) and unique letter patterns (A1,B1,C1,D1,E1,F1,G1,H1) but cannot definitively determine if these represent biological or technical replicates without additional context

Characteristics[NumberOfBiologicalReplic.evidence: No biological replicate count specified in manuscript text

Characteristics[NumberOfTechnicalReplica.evidence: No technical replicate count specified in manuscript text
